executives.name: Gerrie van der Westhuizen
executives.background: Mr. van der Westhuizen is a Chartered Accountant with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the VP Finance of Atlantic Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Jeremy Langford
executives.background: Mr. Langford is a mining engineer with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the COO of Endeavour Mining Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Jeremy Langford
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Langford is a mining engineer with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the COO of Endeavour Mining Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Steven Dean
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Dean is a Fellow of the Australasian Institute of Mining and Metallurgy and a Member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Australia. He was formerly the Chairman and CEO of Atlantic Gold Corporation and President of Teck Resources Ltd.
